title: Streamline Business Workflows
excerpt: Monday.com has been a great tool  in streamlining a variety of business workflows. Through the numerous automatons, views, and column types, users are able to gain visibility into what others are working on. This insight…

posts.author: cbrennan (Colin Brennan)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com has been a great tool in streamlining a variety of business workflows. Through the numerous automatons, views, and column types, users are able to gain visibility into what others are working on. This insight gives teams transparency which ultimately helps everyone work much more efficiently.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Colin,

Thanks for sharing that do you have any specific use cases you’re using monday.com for? We’re sure other users would love to see how you’ve set up your workflows and what you’re using the different features to achieve!
